description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Dashboard: swapped the Computers and Groups summary cards.
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Browse OU: unselecting an OU no longer leaves it in the selection. Clicking a partially-selected OU now clears that branch instead of selecting it, and unselecting clears OUs beneath it.
- Dashboard: the PDC field now shows the actual PDC emulator instead of whichever domain controller the app was connected to.
